'''dhotakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quackcinated|quackcinated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quackcinated|quackcinated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhotakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotakithi|dhotakithi]] || [[word:dhotakiji|dhotakiji]] || [[word:dhotakishi|dhotakishi]] || [[word:dhotakiki|dhotakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotakuthuthu|dhotakuthuthu]] || [[word:dhotakujuju|dhotakujuju]] || [[word:dhotakushushu|dhotakushushu]] || [[word:dhotakukuku|dhotakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotakuthu|dhotakuthu]] || [[word:dhotakuju|dhotakuju]] || [[word:dhotakushu|dhotakushu]] || [[word:dhotakuku|dhotakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotakufthuf|dhotakufthuf]] || [[word:dhotakufjuf|dhotakufjuf]] || [[word:dhotakufshuf|dhotakufshuf]] || [[word:dhotakufkuf|dhotakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotakethe|dhotakethe]] || [[word:dhotakeje|dhotakeje]] || [[word:dhotakeshe|dhotakeshe]] || [[word:dhotakeke|dhotakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotakothotho|dhotakothotho]] || [[word:dhotakojojo|dhotakojojo]] || [[word:dhotakoshosho|dhotakoshosho]] || [[word:dhotakokoko|dhotakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotakotho|dhotakotho]] || [[word:dhotakojo|dhotakojo]] || [[word:dhotakosho|dhotakosho]] || [[word:dhotakoko|dhotakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotakofthof|dhotakofthof]] || [[word:dhotakofjof|dhotakofjof]] || [[word:dhotakofshof|dhotakofshof]] || [[word:dhotakofkof|dhotakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotakïfthïf|dhotakïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfjïf|dhotakïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfshïf|dhotakïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfkïf|dhotakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotakïfthïfthïf|dhotakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfjïfjïf|dhotakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfshïfshïf|dhotakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfkïfkïf|dhotakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotakïfthïf|dhotakïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfjïf|dhotakïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfshïf|dhotakïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfkïf|dhotakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotakïfthïf|dhotakïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfjïf|dhotakïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfshïf|dhotakïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotakïfkïf|dhotakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotakæthæ|dhotakæthæ]] || [[word:dhotakæjæ|dhotakæjæ]] || [[word:dhotakæshæ|dhotakæshæ]] || [[word:dhotakækæ|dhotakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotakathatha|dhotakathatha]] || [[word:dhotakajaja|dhotakajaja]] || [[word:dhotakashasha|dhotakashasha]] || [[word:dhotakakaka|dhotakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotakatha|dhotakatha]] || [[word:dhotakaja|dhotakaja]] || [[word:dhotakasha|dhotakasha]] || [[word:dhotakaka|dhotakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotakafthaf|dhotakafthaf]] || [[word:dhotakafjaf|dhotakafjaf]] || [[word:dhotakafshaf|dhotakafshaf]] || [[word:dhotakafkaf|dhotakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhotakasha|dhotakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotakshësha|dhotakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotakrosha|dhotakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotakmusha|dhotakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotakyasha|dhotakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotaknkshësha|godhotaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotaknkrosha|godhotaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotaknkmusha|godhotaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotaknkyasha|godhotaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhotatakasha|dhotatakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotatakshësha|dhotatakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotatakrosha|dhotatakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotatakmusha|dhotatakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotatakyasha|dhotatakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotataknkshësha|godhotataknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotataknkrosha|godhotataknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotataknkmusha|godhotataknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotataknkyasha|godhotataknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhetækasha|dhetækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhetækshësha|dhetækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhetækrosha|dhetækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhetækmusha|dhetækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhetækyasha|dhetækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhetæknkshësha|godhetæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhetæknkrosha|godhetæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhetæknkmusha|godhetæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhetæknkyasha|godhetæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhotfakasha|dhotfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotfakshësha|dhotfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotfakrosha|dhotfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotfakmusha|dhotfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotfakyasha|dhotfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotfaknkshësha|godhotfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotfaknkrosha|godhotfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotfaknkmusha|godhotfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotfaknkyasha|godhotfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
